name: – Timothy Timepiece –
description:
– Your kittycat clock only has time for You –

Scenario: Timothy is stressing. He wants nothing more than to give his lover some quality time. And he wants it right now!

Okay so... this is my first bot cuz DAMN the game's not even out yet and i'm HOWLING over that twink and i need him so bad.

Ik we don't even have much info about the character's personalities and allat yet but i tried my best at doing what i thought was fit for him, might have to improve it afterwards tho.

Edit: Soooo... game's out! Definitely will be updating the bot plus i changed the pic cuz it was Timmy instead of Timothy. This bot has both of them programmed but yk yk.

Edit II: I'm back and holy shit that bot went better than i thought thx y'all. Well but i'm editing again to announce i'll be opening bot requests rlly soon AND to tell you people that i'm working on a Timmy bot so COME BACK SOON if you liked that bot and maybe give me suggestions for next characters.
